recentTweets.text: The nominations for NY23's America 250 Community Heroes Award are rolling in and I am blown away by the incredible service and patriotism of the submissions so far. Applications are still open so nominate someone TODAY! https://t.co/YmI8xXpY8M

Great meeting with United @steelworkers leaders. The men and women who forge the steel for our bridges, buildings, factories, and infrastructure keep America strong and builds up our economy. They represent a robust U.S. steel industry that supports nearly 2 million jobs. https://t.co/TqWz4RPxun

Serving families across NY23 is the best part of this job. If you need help with a federal agency, grants, flags, service academy nominations, internships, DC tours, or other congressional services, please reach out. We’re here to help. https://t.co/dDcq7awiKD

Nature is unpredictable but repeated failures to reduce wildfire risk and properly manage forests is a policy choice that is now affecting Americans' health. In Congress, I have worked to establish strong bilateral ties with Canadian officials and over the coming days, I am going https://t.co/HjZrJkurJv

Americans should not be forced to breathe hazardous air year after year because Canada refuses to properly manage its forests. This is no longer a one-time emergency—it’s becoming an annual public health crisis. That is unacceptable.

I am reaching out to Members of Parliament
Truth!

NY23 is home to more than 5,700 farms, generating almost $1 billion in agricultural sales every year. That's one topic talked about during my meeting in Washington with New York FFA students. I also shared how The CAREERS Act I sponsored invests in rural career and technical https://t.co/gvPP4TeXw4

I’m proud to introduce the bipartisan Expedited Access to Biosimilars Act. It cuts unnecessary @FDA red tape, speeds access to more affordable treatments, and increases competition. Our bill keeps rigorous safety standards in place while helping patients and families save on https://t.co/kWTPh1uPiN

The past has a powerful way of shaping our future. Great meeting with Ze'ev from the City of David. He shared new archaeological discoveries and a 2-year plan to complete the excavation of biblical Jerusalem's ancient urban core. Archaeology brings this ancient world to life. https://t.co/LjPvlXKvBu

I'm working across the aisle with colleague Dr. @RepKimSchrier to introduce the bipartisan Expedited Access to Biosimilars Act. This will help families and seniors across NY23 by lowering prescription drug costs. Biosimilars are FDA-reviewed medicines that work like existing https://t.co/vqzFhDvuuX

I was born and raised in the Southern Tier and making sure our rural communities have a strong fighter in Washington is why I stepped forward to serve. Thank you to Allegany County Board of Legislators Chairman W. Brooke Harris for your kind words and partnership that will help https://t.co/DhjJgc2djy

Glad to see my bipartisan BUSES Act pass the House Environment Subcommittee. This commonsense bill is one step closer to becoming law. It creates one national standard for bus operators, ends abusive bounty programs, and puts safety first. Now let's get it through full committee https://t.co/htpDJXTVs0

Our rural hospitals are the backbone of communities across NY23. The new $50 billion Rural Health Transformation Program will help modernize care, expand telehealth, strengthen the healthcare workforce, and keep quality care close to home instead of hours away. https://t.co/2Z4088GByg
We owe a big debt of gratitude to volunteer firefighters who risk their lives to protect ours. https://t.co/aCSyqjX7Iz

Safety is the number one priority of government and that means backing up words with actions. I'm proud to deliver federal funding to ensure our law enforcement officers have the tools they need to do their jobs so our communities can thrive. https://t.co/dsXxPIJtun
New York should take him up on his offer.

From the @TheOleanStar on fighting to secure federal funds for the City of Olean Police Department: 

"This redesign will allow them to renovate administrative bookings, holding areas, and create a facility that improves officer safety." https://t.co/yDioEx3Vmy

Hearts are heavy in Washington and across the country after America First patriot @LindseyGrahamSC's sudden passing. It's a topic I talked about this morning with @BobLonsberry on @WHAM1180: https://t.co/mK5NVPniYE

Honored to kick off the 110th Annual Allegany County Volunteer Firemen's Convention in Bolivar. Firefighters leave their families, jobs, and lives behind without hesitation to answer the call, risking everything to save complete strangers. NY23 is grateful for their service. https://t.co/RCwk6ZLICl

Congratulations to Kevin and Mary Beth Muldowney on the grand opening of Route 5 Business Park. It was an honor for Team Langworthy to present a Congressional Recognition Certificate celebrating their investment, job creation, and commitment to strengthening the NY23 economy. https://t.co/yEW5B49bPJ

Thank you to @WENY for putting a spotlight on our work to protect these dogs from the horrific abuse & inhumane conditions that have been going on in research facilities like Ridglan and Marshall Farms. We won't rest until we put a stop to these barbaric practices. https://t.co/HwOhniKxka

Great tour of Cimolai-HY in Olean. American workers are building the future, one beam at a time. These skilled craftsmen also helped build the new @HighmarkStadm, home of our beloved @BuffaloBills, while creating good-paying manufacturing jobs right here in NY23. https://t.co/aoqKudqXMM

American manufacturing and steel production is alive and well across NY23. Great visit in Olean with hard working folks at Cimolai-HY. They produced a lot of the steel for the new home of the @BuffaloBills: @HighmarkStadm. https://t.co/c8PweUlyHo

Safe communities are the foundation for everything: attracting businesses, jobs and economic growth, good schools, and a strong quality of life. But we can only achieve that if the men and women who put their lives on the line to protect us have the laws, resources and tools to https://t.co/IeuY2NFPTU

My partnerships with local officials across NY23 are critical to helping me serve YOU, the taxpayer. Understanding local priorities and then fighting to bring resources home to our rural communities will always be my top priority and I was proud to spend the day in Olean where we https://t.co/kkwnQubcGy

Proud to be in Olean today to announce I secured $1 million through Community Project Funding for the Police Department to upgrade their 67 year old facility. Thanks to Mayor Sherburne & the Olean PD for their strong partnership. This funding passed the House last month and now https://t.co/gHApvSaDl1

Strengthening our economy and lowering prices is our number one priority and we are moving in the right direction: gas prices are coming back down, the unemployment rate is dropping, steady GDP growth, and we just passed a sweeping housing bill that is on the President’s desk. https://t.co/moth2l3hEd

Meeting with the @NYSCAinc in Washington was a powerful reminder that protecting our children is one of our highest callings. These compassionate advocates work every day to bring hope, healing and justice --and it's our job in Washington to make sure there are the laws and tools https://t.co/CZp8uCik9D

From Elmira to communities across the country, Kennedy Valve has been manufacturing fire hydrants and valves that help firefighters save lives for generations. I toured the Elmira plant and met many skilled workers whose craftsmanship helps first responders protect families. https://t.co/6sFcdath36

The @USACEHQ helps keep America strong, building and maintaining critical infrastructure, protecting our waterways, reducing flood risks, and supporting our military. Team Langworthy was honored to recognize outgoing Commander Robert Burnham and welcome Commander Aaron Anderson. https://t.co/sXFGEN1py2

We can't afford to neglect security at our Northern Border where cartels and other bad actors are desperate to exploit any vulnerability they can find. My Northern Border Security and Enforcement Act will ensure we are protected on all fronts. https://t.co/h87bxpwsxa

As we continue celebrating America's 250th birthday, I'm on a mission to honor the unsung heroes of NY23. Remember, our great nation was built by ordinary people doing extraordinary things. Know someone who serves, leads and inspires? Nominate them here: https://t.co/YmI8xXpY8M

175 years. One General Store. Countless American stories. I was honored to visit this historic business and put their 175th anniversary into the Congressional Record for serving the community since the days of frontier settlement. That's America 250: faith, family, and hard work. https://t.co/xF0SsCVuxc

Our Founding Fathers pledged their sacred honor to a bold experiment called America. Against impossible odds they chose liberty over tyranny. 250 years later, our great nation stands stronger than ever. May God continue to bless you, your family, and the United States of America https://t.co/S3837YABkb

We are America. We are the birthplace of countless global advancements. We are the beacon of freedom and hope. We reward invention and innovation and self-reliance and hard work. We are America, a nation that is every bit worth fighting for today as it was 250 years ago. https://t.co/oblCBg40D0

The newly dedicated Liberty Bell in Marilla and the Liberty Bell in Philadelphia are exactly 266 miles apart, but united by the same spirit of freedom. That's the heart of NY23 and America 250: faith, liberty, patriotism, and the unbreakable bonds that make our nation great. https://t.co/ADxxJysWlp

Freedom is ringing loudly in Marilla, where we celebrated America 250 by dedicating the town’s liberty bell. I was honored to be invited to speak at this wonderful event filled with patriotic Americans. Communities like Marilla and Wales in the heart of NY23 represent the very https://t.co/rLK8H0x3Kc

250 years ago, bold patriots joined inside Independence Hall after risking their lives to battle for liberty over tyranny. Their courage changed the world forever. America was founded on God-given rights. We honor our Founding Fathers by celebrating their sacrifice and strength. https://t.co/4MQmUuxMVz

The Room Where it Happened.

This is the EXACT spot inside Independence Hall where New York's four signers, William Floyd, Philip Livingston, Francis Lewis, and Lewis Morris, put ink to paper, forever securing the cause of liberty and helping forge the greatest nation on Earth. https://t.co/gKbZZ25Rwv

My team and I visited the impressive New York pavilion at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall. From our farms to our manufacturing to our rich natural resources, NY-23 plays an important role in America’s history and future. Our innovation and grit embody the https://t.co/ZJtEvR13nP

New York is where some of the most significant moments of the Revolutionary War were fought and won. 250 years later it was great to see our representation on the national mall in honor of this monumental occasion. https://t.co/zCRWOJDZII

Great meeting with @HCANYS in DC. We share a common goal: protect patients while being strong stewards of taxpayer dollars. By working collaboratively to root out fraud, waste, and abuse, we can strengthen home care and ensure resources reach patients who need them. https://t.co/vKzN8Bsk3a

RT @history_dame: America at 250. 

July 2 is one of my favorite dates because of John Adams. 

July 2, 1786, the delegates are exhausted,…
INCREDIBLE celebration at the National Mall to celebrate America's 250th birthday. https://t.co/iFFhgdUuf6

Team Langworthy was proud to present a Congressional Proclamation honoring Lancaster Librarian Meagan Carr for her outstanding service to our community. Through her passion for reading and dedication to our children, she is inspiring the next generation, one book at a time. https://t.co/bbnLIZTU5E

Met with representatives from the Ecuadorian Embassy on Capitol Hill. The United States and Ecuador share a lengthy and strong partnership built on democracy, trade, security, and economic opportunity. Looking forward to strengthening the ties between our two great nations. https://t.co/ddDNDMYcXP
RT @nedpa_ny: NEDPA applauds our elected officials for recognizing critical changes are needed to secure agriculture's workforce and, conse…

As a father of two children, protecting kids online is very personal. The House just passed the bipartisan KIDS Act to give moms and dads more control over content, not AI or Big Tech. We strengthened privacy protections that will keep kids safer online. https://t.co/VgJtBa3syz

From Clarence to Corning, Orchard Park to Olean, and Elma to Elmira, NY23 covers a lot of ground. I’m thrilled that we had thousands of residents join us for this month’s important conversation. We covered a range a topics and if you didn’t get a chance to join live, you can

You deserve a fair shot at living the arc of the American Dream. I'm proud to support the historic, bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act. It will build more homes, lower costs, and help more Americans unlock the door to homeownership. https://t.co/Vtp6ZFeFBx

As America celebrates its 250th birthday, the Town of Hornby is marking an incredible milestone of its own: 200 years. Team Langworthy was proud to present a Congressional Record honoring Hornby's rich history, proud heritage, and the people who make this community so special. https://t.co/pP0KNzJrFe

NY-23 deserves safe, modern airports that keep our communities connected and our economy growing. I'm proud to help deliver more than $2.3 million in federal funding for critical upgrades at the Corning-Painted Post and Elmira/Corning Regional airports. There's also funding for https://t.co/3iZw68mbZe
Here's the link to nominate a community hero: https://t.co/YmI8xXpY8M

A great way to celebrate America's 250th birthday: honor community leaders who best represent the spirit of our great nation and the Founders who built it. Nominate a teacher, coach, nonprofit leader, or hometown hero for my America 250 Community Heroes Award. https://t.co/cMsF4pdspp

Tonight, the House passed the Kids Internet and Digital Safety Act with strong bipartisan support.

As a father of two, I know parents—not Big Tech—should be in the driver’s seat when it comes to protecting our kids online. Families deserve real tools to shield children from

July 4th marks America's 250th birthday and the one-year anniversary of the LARGEST TAX CUT in U.S. history.

Here's how it helped your family: 

• No tax on tips 
• No tax on OT 
• Bigger Child Tax Credit 
• Higher standard deduction 
• Auto loan interest deduction https://t.co/8MGzZ0taz3

I met with @RoswellPark and @LUNGevity to discuss expanding access to lifesaving lung cancer screenings through the EDDY mobile screening program, advancing research, and improving early detection. We're blessed to have one of the world's best cancer centers in our backyard. https://t.co/5CdGBwzhtX

Team Langworthy was proud to honor Ric Dimpfl with a Congressional Record recognizing more than 50 years of service to the volunteer fire service and the Hamburg community. 

Ric received this honor on his 75th birthday, surrounded by his wife Sharon, children, and grandchildren https://t.co/eBefabN48K

.@RepNicole Malliotakis and I sent an official letter to @USDA to get some answers on how Marshall Farms--a facility housing more than 66,000 animals-- is being monitored. We are working to lift the veil on this secretive facility to determine if any laws are being broken and we https://t.co/1muleUNblK

Our important investments in @NIH research drove breakthroughs that are changing lives for people living with cystic fibrosis. I met with the @CF_Foundation to discuss how continued investment in research fuels innovation and lifesaving treatments for families across the nation. https://t.co/RrZjCm3BZ2

kurdistanMentions.text: The future of America’s energy grid is being shaped right now. Great meeting with GridWise Alliance Board Members during their fly-in to discuss accelerating innovation, strengthening grid reliability, and ensuring affordable, secure energy for families and businesses nationwide. https://t.co/zkrRzZxuFl

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for Nicholas A. Langworthy. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 2 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-15T21:36:46Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
